positive: Minimalist and whimsical scene featuring a group of various stylized woodland creatures (deer, fox, rabbit, owl) gathered under a blooming bioluminescent canopy. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing bold, clean silhouettes against a deep, gradient indigo and teal background. Emphasize strong contrast and crisp linework, making the figures suitable for single-color screen printing or embroidery. Use flat vector style elements combined with subtle nature gradients. High detail level, illustration style, highly stylized, graphic novel aesthetic, rule of thirds composition for subject placement, vibrant, harmonious color palette.
